summary: The discv4 protocol divergence is semicolon-only rustfmt noise in decode error returns; no packet validation, RLP decoding, length checking, or message semantics changed.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 120: M	crates/net/discv4/src/proto.rs.
The isolated patch only adds semicolons to PacketTooShort, HashMismatch, UnexpectedString, and ListLengthMismatch error returns.
No wire-format parsing, hash validation, RLP header handling, consumed-length calculation, or buffer advancement behavior changed.
